name: wrap-unwrap
title: Wrap Unwrap
description: Wrap and unwrap text using Markdown-aware reflow.
author: chrismessina

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

preferences.name: source
preferences.title: Preferred Source
preferences.description: Choose a preferred text source. If no text is found there, the other is used.

preferences.name: action
preferences.title: Primary Action
preferences.description: Choose whether the primary action should copy or paste the output.

preferences.name: hideHUD
preferences.title: HUD
preferences.description: Suppress the success HUD after the action completes.
preferences.label: Hide HUD

preferences.name: popToRoot
preferences.title: After Action
preferences.description: Return to Raycast root after completing the action. No-op when launched via hotkey with no Raycast UI visible.
preferences.label: Pop to Root After Action

commands.name: wrap-text
commands.title: Wrap Text
commands.description: Wrap text at a configurable column width.

preferences.name: width
preferences.title: Wrap Column
preferences.description: Wrap lines at this column. Must be a positive integer; falls back to 80 on invalid input.

commands.name: unwrap-text
commands.title: Unwrap Text
commands.description: Reflow wrapped text into continuous paragraphs while preserving Markdown structure.

preferences.name: hyphenation
preferences.title: Hyphenation
preferences.description: When joining lines, remove a trailing hyphen if it appears to be a soft line-break hyphen (e.g., `inter-` + `esting` becomes `interesting`).
preferences.label: Strip Soft Hyphens

preferences.name: keepBlankLines
preferences.title: Blank Lines
preferences.description: Preserve blank lines between paragraphs instead of collapsing runs.
preferences.label: Keep Blank Lines

preferences.name: flattenBullets
preferences.title: Bullet Indentation
preferences.description: Re-indent bullet and numbered lists to a fixed 2-space-per-level step, removing the leading spaces that pasted terminal or rich-text content adds in front of markers. Nesting depth is preserved by relative indent order.
preferences.label: Strip Bullet Indentation
